_comment: Internal WeZimplify product repos (nested under ../wez-internal/). Same shape as projects.json; merged at serve time into the 'internal' group and shown under the Internal tab, separate from customer projects. 'name' must match the repo folder name under wez-internal/ so live git status attaches. Drop a new git repo into wez-internal/ and it shows up here automatically (as a 'review' card until added below).

projects.name: wez-design
projects.title: WeZimplify Design System
projects.summary: Design system - tokens, Geist font, dist build.
projects.note: Not a git repo yet - run git init + add a remote + push to get live status.
